reviews.name: Fabio
reviews.review: Travis is an excellent tutor. It's clear that he prepares his lessons in advance, and he always explains things in a very clear and easy-to-understand way. His classes are well structured and productive, and he makes learning English feel straightforward and comfortable. I highly recommend him.
reviews.reply: Thank you very much, Fabio. I've felt a bit selfish recently because I've also learned so much about Colombian culture through our conversations together. It's definitely worth the prep! I know you'll grow so much in the coming weeks. Keep up the great work!

reviews.name: ILYA
reviews.review: It was a wonderful experience! Thank you
reviews.reply: Thank you, Ilya! I'm looking forward to seeing how much your business grows this year 😆

reviews.name: BURCU
reviews.review: Travis is a great teacher! I am working with him for my residency interview preparation. He comes every lesson prepared, listens carefully during the classes and gives valuable, constructive feedback. I had one of my interviews and it went great, thanks to him. However, I am planning to continue taking lessons, because his impact on my development was very impressive, even in a quite short period of time.
reviews.reply: Burcu, thanks so much for the review 🥲 I was so happy to see this. I enjoy our classes so much because your personality is so warm and welcoming. You're also so willing to take (and improve upon) constructive feedback and it's a huge testament as to why you were able to improve so quickly. I can't wait to see what happens in the future!

reviews.name: Karen
reviews.review: Travis is an excellent teacher. There's something about his teaching style and methodology that makes learning feel easy and enjoyable. I've taken classes with other teachers before, but I'm truly impressed by how well Travis prepares his lessons and helps me work on my weaknesses.
reviews.reply: Thank you so much, Karen. You definitely make it worth the preparation. You're so curious and eager to learn new things. I know you're going to improve so much in the coming weeks 😊

reviews.name: Saabir
reviews.review: Travis is a fantastic English tutor — patient, encouraging, and always fun to work with. He makes learning engaging and easy to understand, and he creates a comfortable environment where you feel confident to improve. Highly recommended!
reviews.reply: Saabir, thank you for the review! I genuinely learned a great deal from our pronunciation practice. Thank you for always coming to class with such a positive attitude and willingness to improve. It always gave me a positive burst of energy to finish my day. Wishing you the best!

reviews.name: Julian
reviews.review: Travis is an exceptional English teacher who truly cares about his students — couldn't ask for a better teacher!
reviews.reply: Thank you, Julian! You really are a joy to teach. I can't wait to see how you improve in the coming months.

reviews.name: Alex
reviews.review: Travis really helped me with grammar. He made it easy on me — a whole list of what I needed to learn on the trial lesson before I even subscribed, and he really makes you feel welcome.
reviews.reply: Even though it was a short time, you studied so hard, Alex (Max 😆). You picked up the grammar points so quickly! I enjoyed our lessons a lot. Don't hesitate to reach out again if you need another crash course 🤙

reviews.name: Logan
reviews.review: It's a pleasure talking and studying with Travis. The course is well-tailored and his accent is the purest style. You will discover your mistakes, talk about interesting topics and advance quickly in your oral English. I recommend everyone to start a trial with Travis!
reviews.reply: Logan! This is seriously so kind. Even though we've just begun, I can already see you progressing. I know your motivation is going to take you to many great places in life.

reviews.name: Rin
reviews.review: Travis is super chill and kind! His classes are always fun and relaxed, but also really well-prepared. Learned a lot and enjoyed every class! :)
reviews.reply: Thank you so much, Rin ☺️ I always enjoy our classes so much. And I love getting to share our Japan experiences together. I really wish you the best of luck in your job search!

reviews.name: Mitra
reviews.review: He is perfect, actually. I have had a lot of lessons with him and he's very professional. He's very kind and every lesson I can see he's more kind, professional and patient 🌸👏
reviews.reply: Aww, this made my morning, Mitra! My lessons with you have made me miss visiting my family in northern California. I love how we get to talk about wineries and that side of the business. It also goes without saying, but you're also so positive that it makes my day each time!

reviews.name: Lisang
reviews.review: Travis is a great teacher. He offers great help to my job interview preparation. To be specific, he scientifically helps me organize my behavior questions in a STAR way. Besides, he gives suggestions on judiciously arranging the proportion of each part and highlighting the contents that catch the interviewer. He is a teacher worth trying language learning with.
reviews.reply: Thank you, Lisang! I'm very proud of how much you accomplished in such a short time despite the mountain of interview prep you had to go through. 🏔️ You're going to do great things, I just know it.

reviews.name: Bobby
reviews.review: Travis is a great teacher. Learning with him has been a valuable and rewarding experience for me. I'm a long-term English learner and have taken many breaks in the past, but with Travis, I've been able to keep learning and truly enjoy studying English. He adjusts the topic, theme, or lecture style based on my preferences, while also highlighting key points to help me improve effectively. He prepares learning materials that match my preferences and keeps me motivated by customizing both the content and the teaching approach.
reviews.reply: Thank you for this, Bobby! And thanks as always for all of your hard work and bringing forth so many interesting topics. Each one has taught me something new. Fun fact: the lesson structure we built together has benefited many of my other students as well 😆 So, an added thanks is in order 🙇🏻‍♂️ I'm very much looking forward to the future!

reviews.name: Hinata
reviews.review: They are a wonderful teacher who gives highly personalized tasks and lessons to help each person achieve their goals.
reviews.reply: Thank you, Hinata! You have been working so hard. It inspires me to work hard alongside you 🫡

reviews.name: Yitong
reviews.review: Great teacher! Very supportive and patient!
reviews.reply: Thank you so much, Yitong! Lessons with you have been such a treat. I feel like our time kind of just flies by during class. You've improved so much and are always so eager to learn. I'm very thankful for you.

reviews.name: Yang (洋)
reviews.review: The teacher is very patient and experienced.
reviews.reply: Thank you, Yang! Thank you for being patient with me as well 😃

reviews.name: Azatuhi
reviews.review: I highly recommend Teacher Travis to anyone looking for an outstanding English teacher. It was a pleasure learning from Travis and I must say that he is an exceptional English teacher. With his outstanding knowledge, he makes learning effective and enjoyable.
reviews.reply: Thank you, Aza! I enjoyed our lessons so much. You had the most positive attitude I've ever encountered. I always left class feeling so full. Best of luck to you on your TOEFL, I know you'll do wonderfully 😊

reviews.name: Bree
reviews.review: He's so amazing. I can learn lots of things from him.
reviews.reply: Thank you, Bree 🥲 It's amazing how much you've grown in this short time. I'm excited for the future!

reviews.name: Patricia
reviews.review: Great lessons with Travis. Excellent tutor. I enjoy his classes very much and always look forward to attending the next one.
reviews.reply: Thank you so much, Patricia. I always look forward to our classes as well 😆 You're always so quick to learn new things and you're never afraid to make mistakes. I look forward to seeing you grow as a student AND as a teacher 😊

reviews.name: Meron
reviews.review: Travis is an exceptional English tutor who transforms language learning from a daunting challenge into an exciting journey. His natural ability to connect with his students sets him apart, as he quickly establishes a comfortable rapport that makes conversations feel more like engaging dialogues with a friend than formal language lessons. Identifying great discussion topics, he inspires confidence, making each lesson an opportunity for linguistic and personal growth that extends far beyond grammar and pronunciation.
reviews.reply: Meron, I'm ecstatic. What a thoughtful review! Thank you so much — especially for the many things you've taught me about Ethiopian culture. I've mentioned in class, but I often talk to my friends and colleagues about how interesting and engaging the topics we cover are. They typically go beyond just the classroom. I appreciate the review so much. Thanks again 😊

reviews.name: Vamsi
reviews.review: I cannot thank Travis enough for all the help he has given me throughout my time in his class. When I first started, I struggled a lot with certain areas of English, but Travis made a huge difference in my learning, and I have improved so much thanks to his guidance. What I appreciate most about Travis is how he really took the time to understand where I was struggling. Whether it was grammar, speech, or just making sense of complicated texts, he was always patient and willing to explain things as many times as I needed. He never made me feel embarrassed for asking questions, and his way of breaking things down made difficult concepts so much easier to understand. Thanks to Travis, I have seen huge progress in my English skills. I am more comfortable with writing and speaking in English than I was before. I am genuinely grateful for all the support and encouragement he gave me, and I know I will carry what I learned from him with me long after this class is over.
reviews.reply: Vamsi, I usually say these reviews make my week, but this one in particular made my entire month! I am so glad to hear you feel this way. Honestly, many of the concepts and questions you have asked me about have also helped me become a better teacher. I often find myself thinking about your curiosities from class — leading me to research the language more in depth. This has also benefited many of my other students and classes as well because I've now shared this knowledge. Thank you so much for this wonderful review and I've genuinely enjoyed watching you grow in this short time.

reviews.name: Fernando
reviews.review: Travis is an amazing teacher, supporting me to realize some opportunities to improve the language even further. His empathy with the situations that I needed to improve was fundamental to achieving the results I wanted. Great teacher!
reviews.reply: Wow! Thank you, Fernando. I'm very grateful to have met you and always enjoyed our lessons. I'm wishing you the best for all your future business and personal endeavors!

reviews.name: Vanessa
reviews.review: I really like to have classes with Travis, they are always engaging but relaxed. We talk about life and my goals, and he helps me improve my vocabulary to apply in real life situations. I'm always learning something new.
reviews.reply: Thank you, Vanessa. That's so nice of you to say. I enjoy our lessons as well. Especially the ones where I get to learn interesting things about Brazil such as the mashed potato hot dogs!

reviews.name: Wendy
reviews.review: Great tutor.
reviews.reply: Thank you, Wendy. We're just getting started!

reviews.name: Koji
reviews.review: He is a wonderful teacher. His lessons are a lot of fun and he gives great instructions to improve our son's English. Our son enjoys his class every time.
reviews.reply: I'm so grateful to hear that Kojiさん. We always have a lot of fun and still find meaningful ways to learn together. Thank you so much for the review 🙏🏻

reviews.name: Keoma
reviews.review: Travis is the best! A super attentive teacher who cares about what the student likes and needs to speak English comfortably.
reviews.reply: Keoma! Thank you! You truly make the lessons fun as well. I can't tell the amount of things about Zelda, Nintendo Switch, and even Brazil that I have told my own friends back home based on our conversations. The time always seems to fly by when teaching you.

reviews.name: Rituparna
reviews.review: Travis is really a wonderful teacher. I am very grateful that I have Travis as my teacher. The way he explains complex words is very clear to me. It really helped me to understand the actual meaning of a word. I appreciate his teaching method.
reviews.reply: Thank you, Rituparna. I've enjoyed our lessons a lot and practicing your pharmaceutical vocabulary/situations has been so much fun. I know there are great things to come!

reviews.name: Marcela
reviews.review: Travis is a great teacher. He focuses on my goals and asks about my needs to improve the lessons. One of the things that I like the most is that we have real conversations and in the process, I learn vocabulary, grammar and also practice my pronunciation. I think Travis has a great ability to adapt to people and knows how to balance the lessons to be interesting, friendly but keeping the focus on the topics that we have for the session. If you are looking to improve your English with a real experience in conversations, receiving feedback and lessons that don't feel like a traditional class, I totally recommend Travis! :)
reviews.reply: Thank you Marcela :) I feel the same way about our conversations! They feel so organic and you always recommend really interesting topics. On top of that, I've actually learned so much about life in Honduras because of you, so thank YOU. I can't wait for the future.

reviews.name: Murilo
reviews.review: The classes with Travis are amazing, his friendliness and charisma are a differentiator.
reviews.reply: Thank you so much Murilo! I always enjoy our conversations. I feel like I have learned so much about Brazil because of you! 🇧🇷

reviews.name: Marlon
reviews.review: More teachers like him :)
reviews.reply: Thank you, Marlon! You work so hard in and out of class. You're progressing so fast! I'm proud of you.

reviews.name: Hyunsook (Luna)
reviews.review: Travis is an amazing teacher. He uses a customized approach that aligns with my needs and learning style. He is patient and friendly, making every lesson enjoyable and engaging. I will continue learning with him.
reviews.reply: Thank you so much 현숙. I'm enjoying them as well too! I feel like our lessons fly by every time. I always appreciate your hard work and willingness to learn. I'm looking forward to continuing with you!

reviews.name: Yuka
reviews.review: The best teacher I have ever had! He teaches efficiently to achieve my goals. His way of teaching, his personality and humor are all great. I highly recommend him for your teacher!!
reviews.reply: Yuka! Thank you a million times over. I feel like I learn something new from YOU every time we have a lesson together. You've improved so much and I can't wait to see you improve more.

reviews.name: Masha
reviews.review: I reached out to Travis to help me prepare for a job interview in English. He helped me prepare, and I got the job! He was undoubtedly the best choice I could have found. Travis gave me confidence in speaking English, and we practiced questions and scenarios that could come up in the interview. He helped me become more fluent and provided many tips to break the ice and manage my nerves. I will always be grateful to Travis for helping me achieve my goal.
reviews.reply: Thank you so much, Masha! It's seriously been such a joy to teach you. You always work so hard and it shows. I'm confident that you're going to be the best employee this company has ever had!

reviews.name: Akira
reviews.review: I'm lucky to have met such a wonderful English teacher like Travis! Everybody can enjoy learning English in his class. I learned a lot of grammar and writing skills from him. He also had many ideas to study new vocabularies in class. He helped me a lot with my writing training. I hope more people will have opportunity to learn English with Travis!!

reviews.name: Julie
reviews.review: I learned higher education in Korea and came to the United States, but it was hard to speak it even though people could not understand my English. however, I was able to speak English because it was the most comfortable and enjoyable English I learned with him.

reviews.name: Hyunjae
reviews.review: Thanks Travis for turning my fear of speaking English into the joy of speaking it.

reviews.name: Yuria
reviews.review: …for one lesson Travis even sent everyone some American snacks and had a special Halloween class. It was so memorable! Travis taught me a lot of English and I made friends from many different countries. He is always nice to everyone no matter where they come from.

reviews.name: Koko
reviews.review: I'm glad I found Travis. He's patient, friendly and very knowledgeable. He doesn't only teach English from the textbook, but he also incorporates topics that interest the students. I'd recommend Travis to anyone who wants to learn English regardless of age or level.

reviews.name: Mara
reviews.review: Travis' manner of teaching is so wonderful and captivating! He's patient and supportive! He really knows how to motivate his students. He's great at building confidence and keeping lessons fun and engaging through a variety of activities. For example, his unforgettable American Culture Classes helped me not only improve my conversation, writing, and reading skills, but it did so all while learning and respecting my classmates cultures. He always encouraged us to share information about our home countries. I'm grateful to Travis for everything he taught me in English.

reviews.name: Kazue
reviews.review:
If you are looking for a happy, cheerful American teacher, he is the one, but it's not only that, he has an essential skill as a teacher. It shows in little things. He has three skills that a teacher should have:
1. He commits to his students. He remembers little things in our daily life, from chatting with students and cleverly using them to make us laugh.
2. He (even magically) can lighten up a class. (I've seen it many times!) So even though we had an unfortunate grouchy student in the morning, I could still enjoy learning.
3. He doesn't mind spending his time helping students. (and he doesn't make you feel guilty about it!)
He is good at lighting up a class and connecting students. I was so comfortable in the class, and it kept up my motivation and improved my English skills. He is a dedicated teacher. He is the one!

reviews.name: Yumi
reviews.review:
My son, 11, and daughter, 7, have been with us for about a year now.

Ms. Travis is always thinking about how to make learning fun and focused for the children.

He is flexible and incorporates interesting content into his lessons. And the children are able to learn English at their own level.

My daughter was very nervous at first and hardly spoke at all, but she gradually got used to it and now speaks a lot of English in front of Ms. Travis. Thanks to Travis, my children continue to enjoy English.

Please try one of Travis' classes!

reviews.name: Allan
reviews.review: "Travis is an excellent teacher. He always tailors his classes to suit my personality and interests. Learning with him feels like chatting with a close friend. I have clearly noticed great progress in my English during our lessons. Most importantly, he has helped me build up confidence in speaking English. He corrects my grammar mistakes in daily practice, making it much easier for me to memorize grammar rules. I would love to keep learning with him."
reviews.reply: Allan! It's been so great getting to learn with you as well. Your classes have helped me design a lot of other fun classes for students, so thank you as well. You're already growing so much, but I can't wait to see how you grow even more.

reviews.name: Shiraam
reviews.review: I started my English class with a 'C,' and now it is an 'A' thanks to him :D
reviews.reply: Thank you so much, Shiraam! It was a long climb, but your hard work paid off 💪
